About Me

The person behind
the code

B.Tech student in Computer Science and Information Systems at BITS Pilani, driven by a strong passion for building impactful software solutions.

Currently working as a Scholar Trainee at Wipro, contributing to real-world projects and gaining hands-on experience in developing, managing, and optimizing systems at scale.

My work revolves around solving complex problems, writing clean and efficient code, and continuously improving system performance. I enjoy turning ideas into practical solutions and thrive in environments that challenge me to think critically and innovate.

Beyond my professional journey, I actively explore emerging technologies, experiment with new programming languages, and collaborate on projects that expand my technical horizons.
